description: FEG Wrapped ETH. Holders call withdraw(amt) for 99% of their balance as ETH (1% reflection fee). Contract eth_getBalance over-states user-claimable by ~7× because feesAccrued (0.9% of every deposit + 7/8 of every withdraw fee + voluntary burns) is permanently stranded by design — no function exists to redeem it.

meta.candidate_source: Transfer event participants since deploy; balanceOf is authoritative
meta.stranded_eth_note: Contract holds ~403 ETH but Σ holder balanceOf = ~57 fETH (≈ EOA-only 56 ETH user-recoverable); the rest is feesAccrued, permanently locked — no function pays it out.
